children.heading: Regulations to be issued by Director
children.label: a Regulations to be issued by Director
A
children.text: each species of the class Aves;

children.label: B
children.text: each species of the class Mammalia; and

The Director, with the concurrence of the Administrator, shall issue such regulations as are necessary and appropriate to implement Annex III to the Protocol and the provisions of this chapter which implement that Annex, including section 2403(a)(1), (2), (3), and (4) of this title, and .section 2403(b)(1) of this title
The Director shall issue such regulations as are necessary and appropriate to implement Article 15 of the Protocol with respect to land areas and ice shelves in Antarctica.
The Director shall issue such additional regulations as are necessary and appropriate to implement the Protocol and this chapter, except as provided in subsection (b).

children.heading: Regulations to be issued by Secretary of Department in which Coast Guard is operating
children.label: b Regulations to be issued by Secretary of Department in which Coast Guard is operating
children.text: The Secretary of the Department in which the Coast Guard is operating shall issue such regulations as are necessary and appropriate, in addition to regulations issued under the Act to Prevent Pollution from Ships ( et seq.), to implement Annex IV to the Protocol and the provisions of this chapter which implement that Annex, and, with the concurrence of the Director, such regulations as are necessary and appropriate to implement Article 15 of the Protocol with respect to vessels.33 U.S.C. 1901

children.heading: Time period for regulations
children.label: c Time period for regulations
children.text: The regulations to be issued under subsection (a)(1) and (2) of this section shall be issued within 2 years after . The regulations to be issued under subsection (a)(3) of this section shall be issued within 3 years after .October 2, 1996October 2, 1996
